description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in e107 0.615 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the (1) LAN_407 parameter to clock_menu.php, (2) "email article to a friend" field, (3) "submit news" field, or (4) avmsg parameter to usersettings.php.
